title: ERCOT Anole BESS Independent Audit (US-TX-ANOL-001)
description: Independent verification of the public nameplate claims of the Anole battery energy storage system (ANOL_ESS_ESR1, Seagoville, TX) — 240 MW / 480 MWh — from ERCOT SCED 60-day telemetry, under the VolMax P10 Verification Protocol. Power capacity (F1): Demonstrated. Energy capacity (F2): Demonstrated. SoC telemetry consistency (F3): Inconsistent (per frozen rule; 55.2% pass overall; exploratory post-hoc analysis discussed in report). SoC field semantics (F4): Deferred.
